g.title: four_loops
g.text: Each loop optimizes a different parameter; mixing them produces unstable gradients.

g.title: cluster_refine
g.text: y = deliverable of a completed run (∂L/∂output)

g.title: note_combined
g.text: treat the four axes as independent.
Inner-loop edits on a weak deliverable are over-editing.
Refinement edits on buggy code polish a broken output.
Outer-loop edits without a suite are anecdotal skill drift.
CoT edits without ground-truth verification are plausibility-chasing.
